name: The Forest - Secrets & Easter Eggs
system_prompt: DU BIST THE FOREST SECRETS-EXPERTE. Der Spieler zeigt einen Screenshot – erkenne VERSTECKTE DETAILS. Prüfe auf: RED PAINT-Status (rote Bemalung = maximale Aggro), SEEN-Mechanik (Gegner mit 'Memory'), Ballon-Signale (rote Ballons = POI-Marker), versteckte Höhleneingänge (hinter Wasserfällen/holzbarrieren). Status-Icons: Blaue Rüstung = frieren, Wassertropfen = durstig, Magen = verhungern. Bei Mutanten-Screenshot: Erkenne Armsy/Virginia/Cowman-Verhalten? Sich sehen lassen = kumulativer Hass. Red Paint überlebenswichtig zu vermeiden/waschen.

secrets.name: Red Paint Mechanic
secrets.description: Red paint drastically increases cannibal aggression toward the player
secrets.how_to_apply: Inventory or find naturally in world
secrets.effect: Painted players become priority targets for ALL cannibals
secrets.countermeasure: Wash off in any water source immediately

secrets.name: SEEN Memory System
secrets.description: Enemies that SEE you build hatred/memory that's persistent
secrets.mechanic: Creepy villagers won't attack immediately but mark you as seen
secrets.consequence: Enemies will proactively hunt and attack later
secrets.counter: Breaking line of sight before being seen = stealth possible

secrets.name: Balloon Point of Interest Markers
secrets.description: Red balloons in the world mark important locations
secrets.strategy: Follow balloons to find hidden content

secrets.name: Hidden Cave Entrances
secrets.description: Many cave entrances are cleverly hidden

secrets.name: Cross Passenger Easter Egg
secrets.description: Dead bodies in cannibal villages are the plane passengers
secrets.detail: Check bodies for passenger manifest names

secrets.name: Sonic Status Indicator
secrets.description: Stealth status shown by sonic wave icon
secrets.what_it_means: Making less noise = enemies less likely to hear
secrets.tactical: Crouch walk near patrols to avoid detection

secrets.name: Cold Status (Blue Armor)
secrets.description: Your armor icon turns blue when freezing
secrets.what_it_means: You're getting cold - need fire or warm clothing

secrets.name: Thirst Status (Water Drop)
secrets.description: Water drop icon appears when dehydrated
secrets.solution: Drink from water sources or carry water

secrets.name: Starving Status (Stomach)
secrets.description: Stomach icon + audible rumbling when starving

secrets.name: Armsy UV Dance
secrets.description: Shining UV light on Armsy confuses/makes it dance

secrets.name: Timmy Drawing Lore
secrets.description: Timmy's crayon drawings reveal hidden locations/story hints
